title: Effect Swords
description: This Mod adds a bunch of new Swords with costum textures.
body:
A minecraft-mod for SMP-Servers or Singleplayer, if you want to become unstopable.



With this mod you can access new swords that give you effects (for example fire resistance, strength, etc.). To collect these materials for the crafting recipes, you have to defeat various monsters, explore structures, defeat final bosses... The swords work not only when you have them in your hand, but also when you just have them in your inventory. This can make you a very strong player on the server.

The swords have unique textures and have matching crafting recipes.



Recipes are in the galerys



The swords are also perfect for SMP servers.

I wish you a lot of fun.
